1992October 15, 1992

🇺🇸 Dallas, TX, USA

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Dallas, TX, USA, October 1992

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-1992-10-dallas-tx-usa

38 Resolutions

160Plenary
Thank the United States for hosting SC 4 meeting
SC 4 thanks the U.S. for hosting this meeting of SC 4.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
159Plenary
Commend Initial Release team and international experts
SC 4 commends the Initial Release team and all the international experts who have contributed to the completion of the Parts in accordance with the schedule which was set by SC 4.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
158Plenary
Appoint Tom Baker as liaison with ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 7
SC 4 appoints Tom Baker as liaison with ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 7 on software engineering.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
157Plenary
Request PMAG to appoint liaison with ISO/TC 172/SC 1
SC 4 requests PMAG to appoint a liaison with ISO/TC 172/SC 1 on optical systems.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
156Plenary
Appoint Mr. Massimo Actis Dato as liaison with JTC 1/SGFS
SC 4 appoints Mr. Massimo Actis Dato as liaison with JTC 1/SGFS.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
155Plenary
Appoint Prof. Wilhelm Dangelmaier as project leader for P30
SC 4 appoints Prof. Wilhelm Dangelmaier as leader of project P30 on Material Flow Control.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
154Plenary
Appoint Mr. Cliff Borchert as project leader for P29 on External Exchanges
SC 4 appoints Mr. Cliff Borchert as leader of project P29 on External Exchanges.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
153Plenary
Appoint Mr. Martin Holland as liaison with ISO/TC 10/SC 5
Following SC 4 Resolution #110 (Oslo), Mr. Martin Holland is proposed by WG 3 as the liaison with ISO/TC 10/SC 5. SC 4 appoints him as a liaison.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
152Plenary
Appoint Mr. Rainer Glatz as liaison with ISO/TC 184/WG 5
Following the ISO/TC 184 resolution #153, SC 4 appoints Mr. Rainer Glatz as liaison with ISO/TC 184/WG 5.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
151Plenary
Appoint Ms. Sheila Lewis as convener of WG 6
SC 4 appoints Ms. Sheila Lewis (UK) as convener of WG 6, in succession to Dr. Jon Owen, with the appointment to be effective upon the resignation of Dr. Owen.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
150Plenary
Appoint Mr. Albert Colin as liaison with ISO/TAG 7
Following the resolution SC 4 #108, SC 4 appoints Mr. Albert Colin as the liaison with the ISO/TAG 7 / Data Element Coordination Group.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
149Plenary
Adopt project P54 Automotive Mechanical Design AP and appoint leader
SC 4 adopts project P54 "Automotive Mechanical Design AP".
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
148Plenary
Request P35 project leader to propose interoperability concepts to SPAG
SC 4 requests the P35 project leader, Mr. Mark Palmer, along with the participation of WG 4, WG 5, Editing Committee, interested members of PMAG, and experts within SC 4, to present their point of ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
147Plenary
Request EXPRESS Language project leader to present requirements and strategy
To fulfil objective c1 of the SC 4 strategic policy (SC 4 N128), SC 4 requests that the P02 (EXPRESS Language) project leader: * present to SPAG in Torino, Italy (February 1993 meeting) the status ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
146Plenary
Direct Secretariat and SPAG to structure requirements for future STEP capabilities
SC 4 directs its secretariat and SPAG to examine the feasibility of organizing during 1993 appropriate mechanisms to identify and structure requirements for STEP capabilities that will be needed du...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
145Plenary
Direct WG 8 to establish liaisons with UN and JTC 1 groups
SC 4 directs WG 8 to establish liaisons between SC 4 and the following bodies: * United Nations Trade Division * ISO/IEC JTC 1/WG 3 * ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 14
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
144Plenary
Direct Secretariat to circulate SPAG N93 on Global Programming Language
SC 4 directs its secretariat to circulate the working paper SPAG N93 on "Global Programming Language for Manufacturing Applications" to P-member bodies, requesting national comments, priorities, an...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
143Plenary
Adopt SC 4 N164 as information model of main elements used within SC 4
To fulfil the objective #b6 of the SC 4 Strategic Policy (SC 4 N128) and to embed consistency in the SC 4 procedures proposed in SC 4 Resolution #83, SC 4 adopts the document SC 4 N164 as the infor...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
142Plenary
Direct PMAG to define configuration control requirements for STEP evolution
SC 4 directs PMAG to define the requirements for the configuration control to manage the evolution of STEP as defined in SC 4 N165.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
141Plenary
Adopt SC 4 N165 to manage evolution of SC 4 standards and parts
To fulfil the objectives #c2 and c3 of the SC 4 strategic policy (SC 4 N128), SC 4 adopts the document SC 4 N165 as the policy to manage the evolution of SC 4 standards and their parts. This docume...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
140Plenary
Appoint SC 4 representatives to first IEC/TC 93 meeting
SC 4 appoints Mr. Fritz Reuter and Mr. Pat Harrow to represent SC 4 at the first meeting of IEC/TC 93 in Paris, on 29 - 30 October 1992.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
139Plenary
Direct Secretariat to respond to IEC/TC 3 questionnaire IEC 5/1992
SC 4 directs its Secretariat to respond to the IEC/TC 3 questionnaire IEC 5/1992 by sending back the SC 4 terms of reference containing the updated list of projects and the programme of work of JWG 9.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
138Plenary
Direct Secretariat to propose shared guidelines for ISO and IEC cooperation
SC 4 directs its Secretariat to send to the Central Secretariats of ISO and IEC, to the ISO/CEO, and to the secretariat of IEC/TC 93, the memorandum SC 4 N166 (SPAG N106) as a proposal of shared gu...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
137Plenary
Encourage WG 3/T8 and WG 8 to cover the domain of maintenance data
SC 4 encourages WG 3/T8 (Product Life Cycle Support) and WG 8 (Industrial Manufacturing Management) to cover the domain of maintenance data. WG 3/T8 will particularly address maintenance support da...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
136Plenary
Require eight-week advance notice for expected votes prior to SC 4 meetings
At least eight weeks prior to each meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, a memorandum shall be sent to each "P" member country indicating all issues, documents, projects, etc. for which votes are expected at...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
135Plenary
Request principal meeting schedules be determined at least one year in advance
SC 4 requests its secretariat to ensure that the schedule for the principal meetings of the Working and Advisory Groups of SC 4 shall be determined at least one year in advance of such meetings.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
134Plenary
Request registration of WG 2 work as a new standards project
SC 4 asks its secretariat to register the work of WG 2 with ISO as a new standards project, different from 10303.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
133Plenary
Request specific document formats for each STEP Part on NIST SOLIS
For each STEP Part on the NIST SOLIS, ISO/TC 184/SC 4 asks that the following forms be available, consistent and up to date: * Master copy in LaTeX or WordPerfect. * One derived copy containing a c...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
132Plenary
Require an ASCII source listing for CD ballots
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 asks the ISO/TC 184/SC 4 Secretariat to make sure that an ASCII source listing will be available, containing an explicit representation of all characters of the CD text to be ballot...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
131Plenary
Instruct Secretariat to ballot proposed strategic policy statement
SC 4 instructs its secretariat to send out for mail ballot the proposed strategic policy statement, developed by SPAG and WG 2 in the document SPAG N104 V1.4.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
130Plenary
Request member bodies to provide qualified experts to support critical central functions
SC 4 requests member bodies to identify and provide qualified people with adequate long-term commitment and funding to support the critical central functions of qualification, integration, editing,...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
129Plenary
Direct WG 4 and WG 5 to submit required documents as Type 3 Technical Reports
SC 4 directs its Working Groups WG 4 and WG 5 to complete all documents required for the use of the STEP methodologies, and to submit them for approval as ISO Type 3 Technical Reports.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
128Plenary
Request Secretariat to explicitly describe expectations for STEP Initial Release
SC 4 requests its secretariat to clearly and explicitly describe the expectations for the Initial Release of STEP as the basis for national bodies to prepare their own press releases.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
127Plenary
Circulate ISO 10303-21 to P-members by January 1993
Because of the likelihood of changes required to maintain overall consistency, ISO 10303-21 will be circulated to P-members on or before 15 January 1993, so that it can be included in the final dec...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
126Plenary
Allow referencing mechanisms to a part in a standard part library
The Initial Release of ISO 10303 shall allow referencing mechanisms to a part in a standard part library using names and attributes. Such mechanisms shall allow the exchange through a STEP file of ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
125Plenary
Confirm CD ballot target dates and instruct Secretariat to circulate integrated documents
SC 4 confirms the CD ballot target dates for existing STEP documents. The resulting comments, will be addressed at the workshop scheduled for 14 - 18 December 1992 at NIST.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
124Plenary
Note consensus position on Initial Release implementation issues
SC 4 notes the consensus position reached by PMAG and WG experts on the issues relating to Initial Release implementation. This represents a solution to a number of potential ballot comments which ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its thanks to Dr. Owen for his efforts in developing the framework for conformance testing for STEP.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
